titleStmt.title: SII 18.270: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 270. (B.K. No. 85 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: South-western pillar in the navaraṅga in the temple of Siddhēśvaradēva.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 30th year of the reign of Rāmadēva, Viḷambi Āshāḍha śu. 3, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1298, June 12, Thursday f.d.t. ·33.

It records a gift of certain taxes for the worship and offerings to god Siddhanāthadēva of the mahā-piriy-agrahāra Hāvēri. The grant was made by Suṁkādhi kāri Mādayya under the orders of Sāḷuveya Ācharasa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīrāmadēvarā
ya vijayarājyōdayada 30 neya viḷaṁbi
saṁvachcharada Āśāḍha su 3 gu . svasti śrī sā
ḷuveya Ācarsapaṁḍitara nirūpadiṁ . suṁ
kādhikāri mādayyanu śrīmanmahāpiriyagrahāraṁ
hāvēriya śrīsiddhanāthadēvara Aṁgabhōga Amri
tapaḍige 25 Ettina meyideṟe mūlesuṁka mu
ttu māṇikavēna hēṟidaḍevū śrīmāṁnyavāgi dēvari
ge dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭṭadu I dhaṁrmmamanu ya
rasugaḷū mahājanaṁgaḷū pālisuvaru
maṁgaḷa maha śrī śrī śrī © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vvā
yō dhaṁrmmō haratē naraḥ śaṣṭhirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi
viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 18.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
